title: Forge canonical archetype
description: Canonical taxonomy of archetypes accepted as the value of `forge init --archetype <name>`. Per docs/ARCHITECTURE-TARGET.md §3 and docs/new-archetypes-plan.md §3.7, the taxonomy was revised from 4 to 5 archetypes : `flutter-firebase` was removed (Schrems II + CLOUD Act, ADR-007) ; `mobile-only` was renamed to `mobile-pwa-first` (PWA Qwik + native iOS fallback) and is kept here as a deprecated legacy alias for v0.3.0 adopters until B.9 in T8.

x-archetype-descriptions.full-stack-monorepo: Premium SaaS flagship — Flutter + Rust + Envoy Gateway + DBOS + Connect-RPC + Postgres+pgvector + SigNoz/OBI/Coroot.
x-archetype-descriptions.mobile-pwa-first: Public-app archetype — Qwik PWA default + Flutter native iOS fallback when push critical.
x-archetype-descriptions.event-driven-eu: EDA archetype — NATS JetStream + Temporal + AsyncAPI 3.1 + Postgres event store ; NIS2/DORA-aware.
x-archetype-descriptions.ai-native-rag: AI-first archetype — pgvector 0.8 + LLM gateway (Mistral-EU / vLLM) + MCP servers + Qwik streaming UI.
x-archetype-descriptions.rust-cli-tui: Devtools archetype — clap + ratatui + cargo-dist signed releases ; multi-channel distribution.
x-archetype-descriptions.mobile-only: DEPRECATED — alias for mobile-pwa-first ; legacy compat for v0.3.0 (B.4) adopters only ; superseded by B.9 in T8.

x-removed-from-taxonomy.flutter-firebase: REMOVED 2026-05-04 via t4-adr-ratification per ADR-007. Schrems II + CLOUD Act incompatible with Forge EU/premium positioning. See .forge/scaffolding/dispatch-table.yml + CHANGELOG.md.
